name: Sour Cream Chicken Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the green chile sauce and sour cream until well combined.
3. Add the cooked chicken, jack cheese, and onion (if using) to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed and season with salt to taste.
4. Place a corn tortilla in a baking dish. Spoon some of the chicken filling onto the center of the tortilla.
5. Roll up the tortilla tightly around the filling, sealing the edges with a bit more sauce or cheese if desired.
6. Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
7. Arrange the rolled tortillas seam-side down in the baking dish.
8. Pour any remaining sauce over the top of the enchiladas.
9. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 20 minutes.
10. Remove foil and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until heated through and slightly golden on top.
11. Turn off the heat and let the enchiladas cool for a few minutes before serving.
